posts.title: Blaze Ads Watchdog (3rd pass)
posts.text:
[TEST] Blaze Ads Watchdog — Jul 14, 2026 (3rd pass · authority: CLASS_B_ONLY — STANDING_AUTHORITY_v1.0.md unsigned)

RED Meta (live, account 2158768751536031, MTD Jul 1-14) — "Save the Shave UGC Bill _UGC_070326" spend $268.00, ROAS 0.75 — $75-KILL BREACH, STATUS: BLOCKED (7th day). ~$137.11 burned since first flag 7/10 (L-2026-07-10-001). @will re-tagged in 8:49 AM run — not duplicating that tag this pass.
FATIGUE FLAG (new this pass): MTD ROAS decay now Day 3 of 3 consecutive — 0.84 -> 0.79 -> 0.75. Three-day decay rule triggered. Class B — recommending creative rotation via 022 pipeline (Story/Tailwind). Blaze does not brief creative in v1.0. Note: frequency 1.50 (not climbing), CTR ~6.0% (stable) — this flag is triggered by the 3-day ROAS decay rule only, not the frequency+CTR rule. Detail in thread.
Hygiene: duplicate-named campaign pair (IDs 120244295191790118 / 120244294919800118) still unresolved — PAUSED, $0 spend.

GREEN Amazon PPC — Restored (Supermetrics A/B/C, generated 11 PM PT Jul 13, <12h). Slicker Brush violation ($1.05), B0GT1H84JM unrecognized ASIN ($258.62, 44% of account), and KILL-band SKUs (Detangling Treatment / Pin Brush / Rake Brush / 4-in-1 Shampoo) — all already staged by 033 + 8:49 AM Blaze run. A-2 check: $586.72 account spend vs 2x trailing-7d avg $1,014.62 — no breach.

YELLOW Google — $0 spend, not running (expected). TikTok — no connector, manual visibility only.

0 "Blaze:" directives found this run. No STG Jarvis persona post observed today.

Staged by BLAZE routine (STG 044 v1.0, TEST MODE)

posts.title: FATIGUE FLAG detail — 022 pipeline note
posts.text:
FATIGUE FLAG detail — Class B, routed to 022 pipeline

Trigger rule: MTD ROAS 3 consecutive daily declines (0.84 -> 0.79 -> 0.75). Rule says recommend creative rotation after 3+ days of decay.
Campaign: "Save the Shave UGC Bill _UGC_070326" (ID: 120248769281270118), ACTIVE, OUTCOME_SALES objective.

What is not triggering fatigue: frequency 1.50 (flat, not climbing), CTR ~6.0% (stable). The classical frequency-climbing + CTR-falling signal is absent — this is a ROAS-decay-only trigger. The decay may reflect audience exhaustion or poor recent placements rather than creative fatigue specifically, but 3 days of MTD ROAS decline satisfies the rule.

Recommendation: Concept refresh — route to 022 pipeline (Story/Tailwind) for a new hook or creative angle. Per the funnel playbook: visual-first, no price at top-of-funnel, proof over hype. Save the Shave is the hero frame.

Note: this recommendation stands independent of the kill/revise decision on the campaign. If revised rather than killed, new creative is the natural next step. If killed, note the direction for the next launch.

STATUS: OPEN — routed to 022 pipeline (note only; no new campaign without Will's approval)
Blaze routine (STG 044 v1.0, TEST MODE)
